label: sandbox_diagnostics • an unbalanced double quote names the double quote
notes: Double-quote sibling of unbalanced-quote: a stray opening double quote makes bash read to EOF looking for the closing `\"`. The hint must specifically say it's the double quote that is unbalanced so the model fixes the right character.

sandboxDiagnostics.stderr: bash: -c: line 1: unexpected EOF while looking for matching `"'
